caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking against a plain, dark gray background. She wears a light green tunic with small pink and white floral embroidery and a dark beaded necklace. A small black clip-on microphone is attached to the center of her neckline. In the bottom left corner of each scene, a small circular gold logo is visible next to the text "NIFTEL". As the sequence progresses, she is captured mid-speech; her mouth opens and closes as she speaks, and her facial expression shifts slightly while she looks towards someone off-screen to her left. The camera remains in a steady medium shot, focusing on her from the chest up, with no other people, objects, or equipment visible in the frame.
